<!-- indicator: tbl-premature-death-percent-diff-bnhvswnh -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: tbl-premature-death-percent-diff-bnhvswnh
#| tbl-cap: 'Premature Deaths, Percentage Difference Between Black Non-Hispanics and White Non-Hispanics, 2019–2022'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_table_object
render_table_object(object_id="tbl-premature-death-percent-diff-bnhvswnh", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
from IPython.display import Markdown, display
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_source_callout_for_object
display(Markdown(render_source_callout_for_object("tbl-premature-death-percent-diff-bnhvswnh", CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)))
```
